<?php namespace Illuminate\Http\Resources\JsonApi\Concerns; use Illuminate\Http\Request; use Illuminate\Http\Resources\JsonApi\JsonApiRequest; trait ResolvesJsonApiRequest { /** * Resolve a JSON API request instance from the given HTTP request. * * @return \Illuminate\Http\Resources\JsonApi\JsonApiRequest */ protected function resolveJsonApiRequestFrom(Request $request) { return $request instanceof JsonApiRequest ? $request : JsonApiRequest::createFrom($request); } }
